interactables.name: Lord's Desk
interactables.text: A heavy oak desk covered in papers. Most are mundane — tax records, grain inventories. But the ink is shaking, the handwriting deteriorating across recent entries.
interactables.state_alt_text: Beneath the ledgers you find a leather-bound journal. The last entry reads: 'The covenant must be renewed. Father knew. His father knew. I thought it superstition until the crops began to fail. The forest remembers what we owe. God help me, I think it wants blood.'

interactables.name: Family Portraits
interactables.text: Generations of Ashworths stare down from gilded frames. Every third portrait shows a lord who looks... hollowed out. Gaunt cheeks, sunken eyes, hands clenched as if in pain. The dates on these portraits are exactly thirty years apart.

interactables.name: Library Bookshelf
interactables.text: Hundreds of volumes, many in languages you don't recognize. One shelf is dedicated to 'Forest Covenants and Binding Agreements' — the spines are well-worn. A gap suggests a book has been recently removed.
interactables.state_alt_text: With the journal's context, the titles make terrible sense. 'Blood Tithes of the Old Wood,' 'The Thirty-Year Cycle,' 'Pacts Between Root and Crown.' The Ashworths have known about the covenant for generations.

interactables.name: Wine Cellar
interactables.text: Rows of dusty bottles. Most are empty. The lord has been drinking heavily — labels from expensive vintages discarded like common water skins. Despair has a taste, and Lord Ashworth has been drowning in it.

interactables.name: Crypt Entrance
interactables.text: Stone stairs descend into darkness. The air rising from below is cold and carries the scent of damp earth and something metallic. A heavy iron lock bars the way.
interactables.locked_text: The iron gate is locked with a heavy padlock. You'll need a key to descend into the crypt.
interactables.state_alt_text: The gate hangs open. Cold air rushes past you as you peer into the darkness below. The ritual chamber awaits.

interactables.name: Stained Carpet
interactables.text: Someone scrubbed this. Recently. The carpet fibers are still damp, and a faint copper smell lingers. Whatever happened here, someone wanted it hidden.

interactables.name: Grand Fireplace
interactables.text: A massive stone fireplace, cold and dark. Ash from burned papers fills the grate — someone has been destroying documents. A scrap that survived reads: '...cannot let the Church discover the true nature of...'

interactables.name: Guard Duty Roster
interactables.text: Commander Voss's patrol schedule. Guards rotate every four hours. The crypt is checked once per night — at midnight. There's a gap in coverage between shifts.

interactables.name: Bookshelf Panel
interactables.text: This section of bookshelf seems slightly recessed compared to the others. The dust pattern on the floor suggests it has been moved recently.
interactables.locked_text: The panel doesn't budge. There must be a hidden mechanism somewhere.
interactables.state_alt_text: The panel swings open silently, revealing a narrow passage. Cold air and the sound of distant dripping water emanate from within.

interactables.name: Dining Table
interactables.text: A long oak table set for one. The meal is untouched — roast meat gone cold, bread hardening. Lord Ashworth hasn't been eating. A half-written letter sits beside the plate, addressed to no one.

interactables.name: Hidden Alcove in Crypt Wall
interactables.text: A loose stone. Behind it, tightly rolled parchments preserved by cold dry air. Each tied with a different color thread.
interactables.state_alt_text: Five letters spanning three centuries. The oldest ink has faded to brown. The newest -- Silas Maren's -- is still dark. They all say the same thing in different words: goodbye.

interactables.name: Scratched Names on Crypt Wall
interactables.text: Names scratched into stone. Ten names. Ten sacrifices across three hundred years.
interactables.state_alt_text: Silas Maren. Brother Maren's father. Elara's father. Old Maren's son. One name, three lives shattered.

interactables.name: Hidden Letters in Lord's Desk
interactables.text: Tucked behind a drawer: a stack of letters bearing the Ironmarch seal. Dated over three years. They've been watching Ashvale since Lord Ashworth started showing signs of refusing the sacrifice. The Legion knew this crisis was coming. They've been waiting for it.
